历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 8405, significantly advanced to 4905 in 2024, and further advanced to 4591 in 2025, with a cumulative advancement of about 3814 over the past two years, showing a clear upward trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4591; the 2025 science enrollment plan is 88 students, while the 2026 §7 document shows 57 students for science and 29 for medicine (medicine separated from science for independent enrollment), totaling 86 for science and medicine, a slight reduction compared to 2025; after the independent enrollment of medicine, the competition structure for regular science categories has changed, with an overall plan decrease of about 2.3%.

学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science main ranking from 2021 (39th) to 2022 (38th) to 2023 (40th) to 2024 (38th) to 2025 (39th) to 2026 (40th) remains stable in the 38-40 range, placing it among the top universities nationwide; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly positive (6 positive events, 2 negative events), with events such as a master's graduate thanking the security department for allowing an elderly scrap collector to enter the campus, demonstrating humanistic care and enhancing the school's image; Douyin popularity ranks 53rd overall (relatively hot), previously ranked 12th in 2022 (very hot), with popularity declining in recent years but still at a relatively hot level; no significant enrollment gaps recorded; Ecology A+, Grassland Science A+, Chemistry A-, Geography A-, Biology A-, totaling 5 A- and above disciplines; Grassland Science and Ecology are top nationally, while Chemistry, Geography, and Biology are all advantageous disciplines, highly correlated with enrollment majors such as Atmospheric Science, Grassland Science, Chemistry, and Geography.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronics/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, while medical majors like Clinical Medicine and Stomatology remain steadily popular, matching Lanzhou University's offerings in Computer Science, Electronics, and Clinical Medicine; Xinjiang's 2025 science examinees total 52,538, with 2026 total examinees approximately 238,000, and based on the 2025 science proportion of about 68.6%, the 2026 science examinees are estimated at 163,000, a significant increase from 2025, intensifying competition; Lanzhou University is located in Lanzhou, Gansu, in the same northwestern region as Xinjiang, with close geographical distance and similar climate and culture, offering natural regional affinity for Xinjiang examinees; the enrollment quota for Lanzhou University in Xinjiang is relatively small (77 science and 31 arts in 2023), making it a medium-to-small province in cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.text: Considering the continuous advancement of historical rankings, the slight reduction in the combined 2026 science and medicine enrollment plan, the significant increase in the number of local examinees, and the stable positive reputation of the school, competition in 2026 is expected to intensify further compared to 2025, with rankings continuing to advance; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3720, with a range of 3400-4220.
